name: Breakthrough Minerals Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$0.1989. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.2012 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.1989, stop A$0.1535, target A$0.2100. Risk/reward is 0.24:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
